Implants.description: Cybernetic and biological implants from Five Parsecs From Home (Odds & Ends Loot)

types.name: Neural Enhancer
types.description: Cognitive enhancement implant that boosts analytical capabilities and problem-solving speed.

types.name: Reflex Booster
types.description: Spinal interface that accelerates neural signals to muscles, improving reaction time.

types.name: Combat Processor
types.description: Military-grade targeting assist system integrated into the visual cortex.

types.name: Muscle Weave
types.description: Bio-engineered muscle fiber reinforcement throughout the body.

types.name: Leg Actuators
types.description: Hydraulic assist systems integrated into leg joints for enhanced mobility.

types.name: Probability Engine
types.description: Quantum computing implant that subtly influences probabilistic outcomes. How it works is anyone's guess.

types.name: Tech Interface Jack
types.description: Direct neural link for interfacing with electronic systems and computers.

types.name: Subdermal Plating
types.description: Ceramic-titanium plates implanted beneath the skin provide significant protection.

types.name: Adrenal Booster
types.description: Synthetic adrenal gland that releases combat stimulants on demand.

types.name: Targeting Optics
types.description: Replacement eye with built-in targeting computer and threat assessment systems.

types.name: Bone Reinforcement
types.description: Metal-ceramic composite woven into bones for increased durability and striking power.

types.name: Pain Suppressor
types.description: Neural implant that blocks pain signals, allowing continued operation despite injuries.

types.name: Synaptic Accelerator
types.description: Experimental treatment that permanently enhances neural transmission speeds.

types.name: Respiratory Enhancement
types.description: Bio-engineered lungs with increased capacity and filtration capabilities.

types.name: Tactical Display
types.description: Heads-up display overlay providing real-time tactical information and threat analysis.

types.name: Retractable Blades
types.description: Mono-molecular blades concealed in the forearms that extend from the knuckles.
types.special_ability: Can make unarmed melee attacks at +1 damage

types.name: Full Body Conversion
types.description: Major cybernetic overhaul replacing significant portions of the body with machinery.

implant_rules.installation_risk: On a roll of 1 during installation, suffer a minor complication
implant_rules.removal_difficulty: Implants can be removed at a medical facility for 50% of their value
implant_rules.compatibility_note: Some implants may conflict - GM discretion applies
